## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between GrowthX and Tango for content creation and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tango has struggled with previous content marketing efforts, citing challenges with distribution and targeting their broad ICP](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [GrowthX uses AI-powered workflows with human oversight to create high-quality, SEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Tango's diverse customer base (e.g., IT, L\&D, Sales Enablement) presents both opportunities and challenges for content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX team to evaluate fit and confidence in driving results for Tango's specific case](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)

## Topics

### Tango's Past Content Marketing Experiences

  - [Previous agency engagement in 2023: Spent significant money, promised high-quality content, but failed to deliver results](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Attempted product-generated content for software training guides: Some success, but overall ineffective](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Successful initiatives: G2 review solicitation, Reddit engagement, and organic comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Challenge: Broad ICP makes it difficult to target specific audiences effectively](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [AI-powered workflows with human oversight for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Comprehensive research using tools like Exa.ai and Tavly](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [SEO analysis to identify valuable keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [Fact-checking process to ensure accuracy, especially crucial for industries like accounting](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1014.0)
  - [Creation of topic clusters and industry-specific artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Agentic workflows that continuously improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1316.0)

### Potential Partnership Considerations

  - [GrowthX to evaluate if Tango's broad audience is a good fit for their approach](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Tango interested in GrowthX's end-to-end service, including CMS publishing and analytics](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [GrowthX offers limited creative services (e.g., cover images, blog formatting)](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Concerns about speed of results and ROI to be addressed in potential follow-up meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)

### Tango's Target Audience and Use Cases

  - [Primary trigger: Companies implementing new software (e.g., Salesforce, NetSuite, Workday)](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Diverse roles: Director of Business Applications, IT Project Manager, L\&D professionals, Sales Enablement](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=633.0)
  - [Challenge: Competing with established digital adoption platforms and their content](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to discuss Tango's case with GrowthX team to evaluate partnership fit](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1571.0)
  - [If positive evaluation, schedule follow-up call with Marcel, Dan, and Ken](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Address outstanding concerns about result delivery speed and ROI in potential next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1586.0)
  - [Tango to consider internal alignment on content and SEO as primary investment channels](https://fathom.video/share/Xi8-yPhU-xhPxRsz73mMk48Ly8XzgcjN?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
